system.description:
Beastmasters have an unnatural ability to control and influence animals, whether from magical study, cultural practice, a feral upbringing, or natural aptitude. Beastmaster Benefits. This partial Mage class is taken by an Adventurer with another partial class; a Partial Warrior/Beastmaster may be a savage barbarian or ranger, while a Partial Expert/Beastmaster may be a hunter or zoologist. All Beastmasters gain Survive-0, or Survive-1 if they already have it. Many abilities apply to one animal companion. It may not have more hit dice than the Beastmaster’s level plus one, cannot have human intelligence, and normally only one may be bound. It acts as an independent ally and obeys commands that are not contrary to its nature or intellect. A companion must be named. A lifelong chosen friend is limited to one companion but gains Shared Vitality and Mind Call automatically and returns at dawn with full hit points if reduced to zero while its master lives.
